title: ROI-Focused Development System
description: Ensure all automation projects provide clear time/money savings

roiCalculation.formula:
ROI = (Time Saved × Hourly Rate × Frequency) / Development Time

Time ROI = Time Saved × Frequency / Development Time
Money ROI = Money Saved × Frequency / Development Time

evaluationCriteria.description: How much time will this save?
evaluationCriteria.calculation: Hours saved per execution × Frequency per month

evaluationCriteria.description: How much money will this save?
evaluationCriteria.calculation: Cost avoided per execution × Frequency per month

evaluationCriteria.description: How long will it take to build?

preDevelopment.approval: Project must meet minimum ROI before development starts

postDevelopment.optimization: If ROI is below threshold, optimize or discontinue

bestPractices: Always calculate ROI before starting development
Focus on projects that save time for high-value activities
